goal_text:
You are planning your trip in Cambridge.
You are looking for a 'train'. The train should 'arrive by 13:15' and should go to 'london kings cross'.
The train should depart from 'cambridge' and should leave on 'tuesday'.
Make sure you get 'travel time' and 'departure time'.
You are also looking for a place to stay. The hotel should be in the type of 'guesthouse' and should be in the 'cheap' price range.
The hotel should have 'a star of 0' and should 'include free wifi'.
Make sure you get 'phone number' and 'whether they have free parking'.Remember. You don't want booking for train. Just get the information and it all done.
Remember. You don't want booking for accomodation. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are planning your trip in Cambridge
You are looking for a train. The train should arrive by 13:15 and should go to london kings cross
The train should depart from cambridge and should leave on tuesday
Make sure you get travel time and departure time
You are also looking for a place to stay. The hotel should be in the type of guesthouse and should be in the cheap price range
The hotel should have a star of 0 and should include free wifi
Make sure you get phone number and whether they have free parking
